evaluation_protocol.description: Side-balanced pairwise policy evaluation. Each policy pair is evaluated in both Blue/Purple assignments to reduce side-assignment bias.

side_balanced_results.conclusion: aggressive_s1 outperforms baseline_s1 after controlling for side assignment.
baseline_s1 outperforms safe_s1 after controlling for side assignment.
aggressive_s1 strongly outperforms safe_s1 after controlling for side assignment.

ranking.summary: Best overall policy in side-balanced pairwise evaluation. It beats both baseline_s1 and safe_s1.
Second strongest policy. It loses to aggressive_s1 but beats safe_s1.
Weakest policy in this evaluation set. It loses to both aggressive_s1 and baseline_s1.

important_note: These results are based on one trained seed per policy variant. The side-balanced protocol reduces Blue/Purple assignment bias, but future work should include multiple training seeds for stronger statistical confidence.
